name: Red Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 large red bell pepper, roasted and peeled
1 jalapeno pepper, roasted, peeled, and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast and peel the bell pepper (see note below) and seed it.
2. Roast, peel, and seed one jalapeno pepper (see note below).
3. Cook the onion and garlic in margarine until tender.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients except the bell pepper mixture.
5. Bring to a boil, stirring once or twice, then reduce heat.
6. Cover and simmer for 16 minutes without lifting the cover or stirring.
7. Remove from heat, stir in the bell pepper mixture.
8. Cover and steam for about 10 minutes before serving.
